_doc: Tunables for brain/face_tracking.py + brain/person_onboarding.py extensions. See docs/AVA_FEATURE_ADDITIONS_2026-05.md §4.

temporal_filter._doc: Filter recognition jitter — only flag 'new person' after sustained unknown face.
temporal_filter._persistence_doc: How long an unknown face must be continuously visible before promoting to 'new person detected'. 10-15s is the spec; 12s middle.
temporal_filter._cooldown_doc: After promoting one new person, suppress further promotions for this many seconds. Avoids noise if Zeke isn't around to onboard.

onboarding._doc: Tunables for the onboarding flow itself.
onboarding._frames_per_pose_doc: 5–10 photos per pose; 7 is the middle of the spec.
onboarding._verification_doc: After all 5 poses captured, verify with a final frame. If similarity to reference embeddings < this, retry once; if still failing, complete onboarding with face_recognition_quality='low' and flag for Zeke review.
onboarding._trust_doc: Maps the user's spoken 'trust 3' to trust_system score 0.50 (the 'known' band lower edge).
